mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT CAST(RIGHT(AP_KEYNO,10) AS UNSIGNED) KEYNO , AP_KEYNO , AP_NAME , CS.SC_CODENM AS TYPENAME , CASE AP_PRICE WHEN '0' THEN '무료' ELSE CONCAT(FORMAT(AP_PRICE,0),'원') END PRICE , P.PM_NAME , U.UI_NAME , LEFT(AP_REGDT,19) AP_REGDT , CASE WHEN AP.AP_USE = 'N' THEN '사용안함' WHEN AP.AP_USE = 'Y' THEN '사용함' END AS AP_USE_NM , STR_TO_DATE(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d') NOW_DATE , CASE WHEN AP.AP_DEADLINE = 'N' THEN '진행중' WHEN AP.AP_DEADLINE = 'Y' THEN '마감' END AS DEADLINE , AP_APPLY_EN_DATE , AP_ENDT FROM t_applicaiton_manager AP LEFT JOIN t_place_manager P ON AP.AP_PLACE = P.PM_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON AP.AP_REGNM = U.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_common_code_sub CS ON AP.AP_TYPE = CS.SC_KEYNO WHERE AP_USE != 'D'
AND AP_MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{AP_MN_HOMEDIV_C}
ORDER BY AP.AP_KEYNO DESC )A WHERE 1=1
AND KEYNO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND AP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND TYPENAME = #{item.searchKeyword}
AND PRICE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND PM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND UI_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND AP_REGDT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND AP_USE_NM LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( KEYNO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR AP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR TYPENAME = #{item.searchKeyword} OR PRICE LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR PM_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR UI_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR AP_REGDT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR AP_USE_NM LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)
mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT @rownum:=@rownum+1 as COUNT , A.* , IF(A.DIVISION = '신청',CONCAT( A.APP_ST_DATE, ' / (',APP_SEQUENCE,')',APP_ST_TIME), CONCAT(A.APP_ST_DATE, ' / ', APP_ST_TIME)) SEQ , CASE TOTALPRICE WHEN 0 THEN '무료' ELSE CONCAT(FORMAT(TOTALPRICE,0),'원') END PRICE
FROM ( SELECT CAST(RIGHT(APP.APP_AP_KEYNO,10) AS UNSIGNED) APP_AP_KEYNO , AM.AP_NAME , U.UI_REP_NAME UI_NAME , CAST(RIGHT(APP.APP_KEYNO,10) AS UNSIGNED) APP_KEYNO , LEFT(APP.APP_REGDT, 19) APP_REGDT , APP.APP_ST_DATE , APP.APP_SEQUENCE , APP.APP_ST_TIME , CASE WHEN APP.APP_DIVISION = 'SC_0000000342' THEN '신청' WHEN APP.APP_DIVISION = 'SC_0000000343' THEN '강좌' END AS DIVISION , CASE WHEN APP.APP_STATUS = 'SC_0000000344' THEN '결제대기' WHEN APP.APP_STATUS = 'SC_0000000345' THEN '신청완료' WHEN APP.APP_STATUS = 'SC_0000000346' THEN '신청취소' WHEN APP.APP_STATUS = 'SC_0000000347' THEN '대기자' WHEN APP.APP_STATUS = 'SC_0000000348' THEN '결제만료' WHEN APP.APP_STATUS = 'SC_0000000349' THEN '관람완료' END AS STATUS , IFNULL(SUM(APD.APD_PRICE*APD.APD_CNT),0) TOTALPRICE FROM t_application_participate APP
LEFT JOIN t_application_user AU ON APP.APP_APU_KEYNO = AU.APU_KEYNO
LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON AU.APU_UI_KEYNO = U.UI_KEYNO
LEFT JOIN t_apply_participate_discount APD ON APP.APP_KEYNO = APD.APD_APP_KEYNO
LEFT JOIN t_applicaiton_manager AM ON APP.APP_AP_KEYNO = AM.AP_KEYNO ,(SELECT @rownum:=0)TMP WHERE AM.AP_KEYNO IS NOT NULL
AND AP_MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{AP_MN_HOMEDIV_C}
GROUP BY APD.APD_APP_KEYNO ORDER BY APP.APP_REGDT ) A
ORDER BY COUNT DESC ) AA WHERE 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND DIVISION = #{item.searchKeyword}
AND AP_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND UI_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND SEQ LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND PRICE LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND APP_REGDT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND STATUS = #{item.searchKeyword}
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR DIVISION = #{item.searchKeyword} OR AP_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR UI_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR SEQ LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR PRICE LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR APP_REGDT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR STATUS = #{item.searchKeyword} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)

SELECT CASE WHEN AP.AP_USE = 'N' THEN '사용안함' WHEN AP.AP_USE = 'Y' THEN '사용함' END AS AP_USE_NM , STR_TO_DATE(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d') NOW_DATE , CASE WHEN AP.AP_DEADLINE = 'N' THEN '진행중' WHEN AP.AP_DEADLINE = 'Y' THEN '마감' END AS DEADLINE , AP.* , P.PM_NAME , U.UI_NAME , GROUP_CONCAT(AD_KEYNO) AD_KEYNO , CS.SC_CODENM AS TYPENAME FROM t_applicaiton_manager AP LEFT JOIN t_place_manager P ON AP.AP_PLACE = P.PM_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON AP.AP_REGNM = U.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN t_applicaiton_discount_select ADS ON AP.AP_KEYNO = ADS.AP_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_common_code_sub CS ON AP.AP_TYPE = CS.SC_KEYNO WHERE AP_USE != 'D' AND AP.AP_KEYNO = #{AP_KEYNO} GROUP BY AP.AP_KEYNO ORDER BY AP.AP_KEYNO DESC

SELECT AP.* , P.PM_NAME , P.PM_FS_KEYNO , P.PM_SEAT_FS_KEYNO , CONCAT('/resources/img/upload/',FS_FOLDER,FS_CHANGENM, '.',FS_EXT) FS_PATH , U.UI_NAME
, MAX(ASM_ENDT) END_DATE FROM t_applicaiton_manager AP
LEFT JOIN t_application_schedule_main ASM ON AP.AP_KEYNO = ASM.ASM_AP_KEYNO
LEFT JOIN t_place_manager P ON AP.AP_PLACE = P.PM_KEYNO
LEFT JOIN u_userinfo U ON AP.AP_REGNM = U.UI_KEYNO
LEFT JOIN t_applicaiton_discount_select ADS ON AP.AP_KEYNO = ADS.AP_KEYNO
LEFT JOIN s_common_file_sub FS ON P.PM_FS_KEYNO = FS.FS_KEYNO
WHERE AP_USE = 'Y' AND AP.AP_TYPE = #{AP_TYPE} GROUP BY AP.AP_KEYNO HAVING AP_MN_HOMEDIV_C = (SELECT HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C FROM s_home_manager WHERE HM_TILES = #{apTiles} AND HM_USE_YN='Y') ORDER BY AP.AP_KEYNO DESC
SELECT AD.* FROM t_application_discount AD WHERE AD_USE != 'D' AND AD_KEYNO = #{AD_KEYNO} AND AD_TYPE != 'C' ORDER BY AD_KEYNO DESC
SELECT COUNT(*)
SELECT AD.* FROM t_application_discount AD WHERE AD_USE != 'D' AND AD_TYPE != 'C' ORDER BY FIELD(AD_DEFAULT_YN,'Y','N'), AD_KEYNO
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_application_schedule_sub WHERE ASS_ASM_KEYNO IN ( SELECT ASM_KEYNO FROM t_application_schedule_main WHERE ASM_AP_KEYNO = #{AP_KEYNO} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_application_participate WHERE APP_AP_KEYNO = #{AP_KEYNO} AND APP_DELYN = 'N'

SELECT ASS.* , LEFT(ASS.ASS_ST_TIME, 2) st_h , RIGHT(ASS.ASS_ST_TIME, 2) st_m , LEFT(ASS.ASS_EN_TIME, 2) en_h , RIGHT(ASS.ASS_EN_TIME, 2) en_m FROM t_application_schedule_main ASM
LEFT JOIN t_application_schedule_sub ASS ON ASM.ASM_KEYNO = ASS.ASS_ASM_KEYNO
WHERE ASM_AP_KEYNO = #{AP_KEYNO} ORDER BY ASS_ST_TIME

SELECT * FROM t_application_user WHERE APU_UI_KEYNO = #{APU_UI_KEYNO} AND APU_DELYN = 'N'
AND APU_SELFYN = 'Y'

SELECT FS.FS_KEYNO FS_KEYNO1 , FS.FS_ORINM FS_ORINM1 , CONCAT(FS.FS_FOLDER, FS.FS_CHANGENM, '.', FS.FS_EXT) SEATBACKGROUND_PATH , FS.FS_PUBLIC_PATH SEATBACKGROUND_PUBLIC_PATH FROM t_place_manager P LEFT JOIN s_common_file_sub FS ON P.PM_SEAT_FS_KEYNO = FS.FS_KEYNO WHERE P.PM_KEYNO = #{AP_PLACE}
